Unless an office has a break room or lounge area that is available for employees to use after hours, it's unlikely that people would choose to spend time in an office when they're not working. People might hang out in offices during work hours, but outside of those times, they might prefer to go to a coffee shop, park, or other public space to socialize or relax.
